note: HKEX discontinued the northbound buy/sell split in August 2024; northbound is turnover-only since. The narrowing is part of the record — northbound NET flow is never estimated here.
source: HKEX Stock Connect daily statistics (keyless official prints)

units.nb_turnover_b: CNY bn, total turnover, SSE+SZSE combined
units.southbound_net_b: HKD bn, buy minus sell, SSE+SZSE combined
